057],[291,555,1776530210077],[290,555,1776530210092],[291,557,1776530210102],[293,557,1776530210110],[293,558,1776530210119],[294,559,1776530210135],[296,560,1776530210148],[297,561,1776530210157],[298,563,1776530210171],[299,565,1776530210187],[300,566,1776530210200],[299,565,1776530210217],[298,565,1776530210226],[298,564,1776530210233],[297,564,1776530210249],[296,564,1776530210256],[295,563,1776530210269],[294,563,1776530210281],[293,562,1776530210293],[292,562,1776530210304],[291,561,1776530210311],[290,561,1776530210320],[289,561,1776530210328],[289,560,1776530210334],[290,560,1776530210347],[291,560,1776530210357],[291,561,1776530210372],[292,561,1776530210386],[293,561,1776530210408],[294,561,1776530210415],[295,562,1776530210427],[296,562,1776530210435],[297,562,1776530210447],[298,562,1776530210466],[299,563,1776530210481]],"mm-mp":16.693969396939693,"md":[[300,567,1776530210201]],"md-mp":4143.0,"mu":[[300,567,1776530210340]],"mu-mp":4160.75},"v":1,"tc":{}}
